intro: Minuartia oreina, also known as Oreina's minuartia or red-stemmed minuartia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, such as inflammation and digestive problems, due to its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
